attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXSCM_CST_COGS_MILSTN_TBL)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL.ORDER_NUMBER, STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL.ORDER_LINE_NUM, STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL.SHIP_SET_NUMBER, STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL.ORDER_HEADER_ID, STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL.ORDER_LINE_ID, STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL.SHIP_SET_ID, STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL.DELIVERY_ID, STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL.BOOKING_OU_ID, STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL.SHIPPING_OU_ID, STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL.SHIPPING_OU_LEDGER_ID, STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL.HYBRID_ORDER, STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL.REVENUE_LINE, STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL.COGS_TRIGGER_EVENT, STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL.COGS_EVENT_DATE, STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL.CURRENT_MILESTONE_EVENT, STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL.CURRENT_MILESTONE_DATE, STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL.COGS_RECOGNITION_DATE, STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL.COGS_RECOGNITION_FLAG, STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL.RECORD_STATUS, STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL.ERROR_MSG, STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL.SHIP_FROM_ORG_ID, STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL.SCEXT_RUN_DATE, STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL.BES_RAISE_DATE, STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL.GCOGS_RUN_DATE, STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL.CHILD_REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL.REVENUE_EVENT_STATUS, STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL.REVENUE_DECOUPLE_EVENTS, STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL.REVENUE_HOLD_REASON, STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL.REVENUE_EVENT_TIMESTAMPS, STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL,
 (
 select ORDER_LINE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL
 minus
 select ORDER_LINE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.ORDER_LINE_ID = STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL.ORDER_LINE_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_X_CST_COGS_MILESTONE_TBL.REFRESH_DATETIME
